module_info.docstring:
Test script for MCP integration in GPT Researcher

This script tests two MCP integration scenarios:
1. Web Search MCP (Tavily) - News and general web search queries
2. GitHub MCP - Code repository and technical documentation queries

Both tests verify:
- MCP server connection and tool usage
- Research execution with default optimal settings
- Report generation with MCP data

Prerequisites:
1. Install GPT Researcher: pip install gpt-researcher
2. Install MCP servers:
   - Web Search: npm install -g tavily-mcp
   - GitHub: npm install -g @modelcontextprotocol/server-github
3. Set up environment variables:
   - GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN: Your GitHub Personal Access Token
   - OPENAI_API_KEY: Your OpenAI API key
   - TAVILY_API_KEY: Your Tavily API key

functions.name: get_mcp_config
functions.docstring: Get MCP configuration with environment variables.

functions.name: get_github_mcp_config
functions.docstring: Get GitHub MCP configuration with environment variables.

functions.name: test_web_search_mcp
functions.docstring: Test MCP integration with web search (Tavily) for news and general topics.

functions.name: test_github_mcp
functions.docstring: Test MCP integration with GitHub for code-related queries.
